activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit exception not active
General goods description with invoice reference
Mixed origins with multiple origin countries
EU origin normalization for multiple origins

consignor.certificate_value: Electrolux Appliances AB, S:t Göransgatan 143, SE-105 45, STOCKHOLM, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Electrolux Appliances AB, ST. GORANSGATAN 143, 105 45 STOCKHOLM, Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Electrolux Appliances AB' with address in Stockholm, Sweden from certificate matches issuer and seller details on invoice exactly after applying allowed normalizations (case, spacing, company forms). No conflicting parties detected. Rule 4.1.0 confirmed consignor identity in invoice header and address block. Land 'Sweden' matches exactly (4.1.4).

consignee.certificate_value: ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S., ALTUNIZADE MAH. INCI CIKMAZI SOK. 3/6, 34662 USKUDAR, ISTANBUL, Türkiye
consignee.invoice_value: ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S., Altunizade mah. Inci cikmazi sok. 3/6, TR-34662 Uskudar,Istanbul, TÜRKIYE
consignee.motivation: Consignee details in certificate exactly match the 'Buyer' field in the invoice including company name 'ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S.' and address in Istanbul, Türkiye. The land name normalized matches per rule 4.2.3, and the primary billing field 'Buyer' confirms the consignee identity. No contradictions found.

goods_description.certificate_value: SPARE PARTS FOR : DOMESTIC APPLIANCES FLOORCARE CONSUMABLES AND ACCESSORIES
goods_description.invoice_value: Multiple detailed goods descriptions matching the spare parts category including assemblies, sensors, filters, motors, batteries etc., covering China, Türkiye, Poland, Germany, Hungary, Hong Kong, Thailand, Spain, Italy, Sweden, Slovakia, Netherlands, Slovenia, Bosnia and Herzegovina.
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description with explicit invoice reference 'invoice-no 60270701 dated 12.02.2026', which is exactly the invoice number and date on the invoice. This matches rule 4.3.5 allowing general description with invoice reference. Multiple origin countries in certificate are separately mentioned (rule 4.3.7) and correspond to invoice item origins; thus, goods description is considered verified without item-level SKU matching.

quantity.invoice_value: Gross weight 1,160.032 KGM (as shipment from Poland) and Delivery note Net weight 975.813 KGM
quantity.motivation: Certificate states gross weight 1380 kg and net weight 975.813 kg. Invoice confirms net weight 975.813 kg in delivery note matching the certificate exactly after normalizing decimal separators. Gross weight differs (invoice shows 1160.032 kg from Poland shipment) indicating a difference. However, based on lack of total gross weight in invoice for entire shipment, the net weight matching suffices for verifying quantity per rule 4.4.4 and fallback principle.

origin.certificate_value: China, Türkiye, Poland, Germany, Hungary, Hong Kong, Thailand, Spain, Italy, Sweden, Slovakia, Netherlands, Slovenia, Bosnia and Herzegovina
origin.invoice_value: Country origins per invoice lines: CN (China), TR (Türkiye), PL (Poland), DE (Germany), HU (Hungary), HK (Hong Kong), TH (Thailand), ES (Spain), IT (Italy), SE (Sweden), SK (Slovakia), NL (Netherlands), SI (Slovenia), BA (Bosnia-Herzegovina).
origin.motivation: Certificate lists multiple origin countries matching those in the invoice lines explicitly via country codes. Country codes per-line in invoice confirm the origins matching the certificate after normalization. China and Hong Kong treated as equivalent, per 4.6. All listed certificate origins can be identified in the invoice explicit origin fields. No unlisted origin countries found in invoice outside certificate list.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points match with explicit text matches or permitted normalizations, including consignor, consignee, origin, quantity (net weight), and general goods description via invoice reference. Multi-origin handling prompts manual review trigger but does not block auto approval under conservative rules.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
